calendar.matters:
Minor'S Compromise In Scd
Off Calendar Sep-08-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Ron Sinclair.
Peter Fredman, Esq. for Petitioner: Jill Saulsbury Hudson, present as Guardian at litem for and with: Davon Benson, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise of $195,000.00 is approved.
Attorney's Fees $48,750.00
Medical Expenses $5,000.00
Costs $3,700.00
The remaining proceeds $127,550.00 to be used for purchase of an ANNUITY as described in Exhibit " A".
A net balance of $10,000.00 to be depositted into a blocked account with Washington Mutual, located at 3rd Street, San Francisco.
Counsel to prepare Orders.

Sept. 8, 2004
Order approving compromise of claims and Order to deposit money into blocked account, signed by Comm. Kaplan.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-11-2003 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd 218 At 09:00 Am On March 6, 2003
Off Calendar Mar-11-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire, clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Floyd Butler. Kelly McKeekin, Esq. appeared for Plaintiff, Brayton Purcell. Jill Saulsbury, Guardian ad Litem was sworn and examined. The following exhibits were marked for identification: A) - Injury/Accident Report; B) Photograph - playground structure; C) Report - medical bills. On the basis of evidence received, the Court grants the judgment as prayed for in the petition. Judgment signed in open court.
